title: Why This Is the Most Exciting Time to Be Human | Ken Ono, Axiom Math
summary: Ken Ono argues that humans cannot compete with AI on knowledge alone, but that curiosity, judgment, and discovery define intelligence in the AI age. He draws on Ramanujan's legacy to advocate for developing these distinctly human qualities rather than focusing on factual knowledge that machines can access.
